title: CtReset Method, Spel Class
parameters: BitNumber	Number of the input bit set as a counter. (Only 16 counters can be active at the same time.
description: Resets the counter value of the specified input counter.  Also defines the input as a counter Input.
see_also:
Ctr

CtReset Example

VB Example:

m_spel.CtReset(2)

C# Example:

m_spel.CtReset(2);
